'''Amil Karsk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was a member of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
During his fifteenth mission as a Rebel pilot, a raid against an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy escorted by a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]], Karsk claimed his fifth [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] kill. However, [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], on his first sortie, claimed the same TIE Fighter as the third of five kills of his own. Biggs agreed to Karsk have the kill, and afterward gave Karsk the third out any group of five things that Biggs received. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Biggs allowed him to take the third of five scheduled patrols, escorting a courier ship to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. This mission left Karsk on the ground when the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] arrived, and he was killed in the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]].
